Iran: Human Rights | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Commons debates The barbaric regime in Tehran has murdered tens of thousands of its own people. Topical Questions | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Commons debates This morning, we heard Sir Olly Robbins say that there was a “dismissive attitude” and an atmosphere of pressure from No. Topical Questions | Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office | Commons debates Like the Prime Minister, the Foreign Secretary will be aware that Peter Mandelson was on the board of Sistema alongside Russian spies.
